task_completion.description: Verify that a clinical evaluation or patient record is opened for the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GNU Health interface should show a patient record, evaluation, or consultation screen with the patient name 'Bonifacio Caput'.

task_completion.description: Verify that vital signs reflecting an agitated state are recorded in the evaluation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The vital signs section of the evaluation form should be filled out with values that suggest agitation (e.g., elevated heart rate/tachycardia, elevated blood pressure, or increased respiratory rate).

task_completion.description: Verify that an acute psychotic disorder diagnosis is documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conditions, syndromes, or diagnosis section of the evaluation should display 'Acute psychotic disorder' or the ICD-10 code 'F23' (or a code starting with F2).

task_completion.description: Verify that an antipsychotic medication is prescribed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A prescription or medication order screen should show an antipsychotic drug (e.g., Haloperidol, Risperidone, Olanzapine, Quetiapine, Aripiprazole, or Chlorpromazine) prescribed to the patient.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least two baseline laboratory tests are ordered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lab test requests or orders section should list at least two distinct laboratory tests (e.g., CBC, metabolic panel, glucose, lipids) for the patient.

task_completion.description: Verify that a follow-up appointment is scheduled for 5-14 days from the current date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment screen or calendar view should show a scheduled appointment for Bonifacio Caput with a date that is 5 to 14 days after the system's current date.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GNU Health graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GNU Health desktop client being actively used, rather than terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered data into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text and selections should be visible within the proper GNU Health form fields, dropdowns, and tabs, not just typed into a separate text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible running Python scripts or SQL commands to insert the medical records directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Bonifacio Caput. Required Diagnosis: ICD-10 F23 (or starting with F2). Required Medication: An antipsychotic such as Haloperidol, Risperidone, Olanzapine, Quetiapine, Aripiprazole, or Chlorpromazine. Required Lab Orders: At least 2 tests. Required Follow-up: An appointment scheduled 5 to 14 days from the current date.
